case_title: RIVADENEYRA, LIA VS SNOOK, RICK ALLEN et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RIVADENEYRA, LIA AS TO DEFENDANT SNOOK, RICK ALLEN TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SNOOK, RICK ALLEN
PLTF REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR REVIEW. $14.00 PAYMENT RECEIVED.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED PER COMMISSIONER LYONS. COPY SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVADENEYRA, LIA HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-20-1997, GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVADENEYRA, LIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SNOOK, RICK ALLEN TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVADENEYRA, LIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNOOK, RICK ALLEN TED AND AL'S TOWING SERVICE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,048.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
